feat: pass auth_token per-call to search tools for cross-project access

kumiho_fulltext_search and kumiho_search_items now accept an optional
auth_token parameter. When provided, it is written to KUMIHO_AUTH_TOKEN
before auto_configure_from_discovery() runs, so the gRPC client is
reconfigured with the caller's fresh token for that call. This enables
cross-project queries (e.g. creative spaces outside CognitiveMemory)
without requiring a subprocess restart.

commit.message:
debug: přidej diagnostiku fetchTrend + SQL fix pro node_state_history access

- fetchTrend: log params (userId, nodeId, dateFilter, clientOk)
- fetchTrend: test query bez filtrů (limit 3) pro ověření přístupu k tabulce
- fetchTrend: log filtered result (data, error, rowCount)
- index.html: verze panel.js → 20260309a
- migration: GRANT SELECT ON node_state_history TO anon, authenticated

Příčina: node_state_history pravděpodobně nemá tabulkový GRANT SELECT pro
roli anon/authenticated – liší se od RLS policy. user_metrics funguje protože
byl vytvořen dříve s jinými defaulty.

Co spustit v Supabase SQL editoru:
  GRANT SELECT ON TABLE public.node_state_history TO anon;
  GRANT SELECT ON TABLE public.node_state_history TO authenticated;

Co zkontrolovat v konzoli prohlížeče (po otevření panelu):
  📈 fetchTrend params: { userId, nodeId, ... }
  📈 test (no filter): { testData: [...], testError: ... }
  📈 filtered result: { data: [...], rowCount: N }

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stress test: three structural tensions in CFD reframing

Working inside the tensions rather than resolving them:

1. R(I) viscosity correction = only genuine novel prediction
   - Requires n derived from stability (not yet done)
   - Until then: parameterization, not derivation

2. Spatial vs temporal coherence may be conflated
   - C(ρ)=tanh (spatial, sigmoid) ≠ exp(-t/T2) (temporal)
   - 2660 chemistry sessions may test different quantity than
     oscillation basis claims

3. Intent as primitive needs measurement protocol
   - Without SI units + distinct measurement: epistemological frame
   - Framework oscillates between ontological/epistemological claims

Not a validation session. Filed in Research/ + private-context/insights/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Resolve signal-dependent CAP conditions from roadrecon DB

  location include/exclude conditions definitively
- Remove None from scenario permutations (platform, client_app,
  trusted_location, signin_risk, user_risk, auth_flow) so every
  dimension evaluates to a definitive match/no-match
- Only device state/filter remains signal-dependent (no offline data)
- User targeting (groups, roles, exclusions) was already resolved from
  DB via _cap_user_in_scope — no change needed there

Add federation hub and prior art surfacing (v0.3.0)

Federation hub: join an entire research community with one command
(`spore federation join <hub-url>`). The hub is a YAML file listing
all participating repos, re-fetched on every sync to pick up new
peers automatically. Eliminates N-squared manual configuration.

Prior art: `spore experiment start` now surfaces relevant findings
from the same direction, so agents see what others have already
discovered before starting their own work.

Also adds VISION.md documenting the "standing on shoulders" philosophy,
protocol design, and roadmap.

324 tests passing, zero lint issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Orb — echo fade on pause, exhale on song end, drain on skip

Pause:
- Wind-down target 0.12 → 0.0 (fully fades out)
- Wind-down duration 800ms → 1200ms (slower, more graceful)
- During wind-down: keeps pushing shrinking frames + drains 2 old layers/frame
- Idle: drains remaining layers one by one until just 1 remains
- Phase slows to 0.001 during wind-down, stops at idle

Song end:
- Exhale window 6s → 10s with power curve (^1.5) for gradual fade

Skip:
- Skip-spool idle target 0.12 → 0.0 (no lingering shape)

commit.message:
fix: prevent cleartext NuGet credentials from being committed in tracked nuget.config

When a repo already has a tracked nuget.config, mergeNugetCredentials injects
secrets into it but git add -A would stage the modified file. Mark it with
--assume-unchanged so the credential-injected version is never committed.

commit.message:
fix: read cwd from deepest child process instead of PTY root

The PTY process (node) cwd rarely changes. Walk the process tree
with pgrep -P to find the leaf child process (actual shell/agent)
and read its cwd instead.

commit.message:
Fix impersonation: use clerk.client.signIn.create() with actor token

The v7 signals useSignIn().ticket() rejects calls when already signed in.
The __clerk_ticket URL param only works for invitation tokens, not actor tokens.
Using clerk.client.signIn.create({ strategy:'ticket', ticket }) via the old
SignInResource + clerk.setActive() correctly creates an actor session
alongside the existing admin session (multi-session).

commit.message:
perf(ci): build amd64 only and cache node_modules directly

- Remove arm64 cross-compilation from CI (saves ~3.5min per Go service)
  arm64 images can be built natively on Apple Silicon for local dev
- Remove QEMU setup (no longer needed for single-arch build)
- Cache node_modules directory instead of npm download cache
  skips npm ci entirely when package-lock.json unchanged (~68s saved)

fix(hotels): smarter grouping, RTL layout, date normalization

  name's words shared + min 2 words) so "KC Grande Resort & Spa" and
  "KC Grande Resort Koh Chang" merge correctly

  fixing Holiday Inn Pattaya split caused by date format mismatch

commit.message:
fix: skip retry on non-retriable 4xx errors in guest-agent (#4121)

* fix: skip retry on non-retriable 4xx errors in guest-agent

4xx errors (except 429) are deterministic — retrying won't help.
Return immediately with an error instead of exhausting all retry attempts.

Closes #4120

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add 4xx early-return regression tests for guest-agent http

- Add tests verifying 400/403 returns immediately (1 call, no retries)
- Add tests verifying 429 still retries up to max_retries
- Extract HTTP_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS constant to replace magic number 429
- Update post_json doc comment to reflect early-return behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
rebrand rfc → orfc, remove Google OAuth, magic link only

- Rename all packages: @orfc/cli, @orfc/web
- CLI binary: orfc (was rfc), config dir: ~/.orfc
- Default API URL: https://orfc.dev
- All user-facing strings updated across CLI and web
- Remove GoogleProvider from NextAuth, keep email OTP only
- Remove GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET from env files
- Update email templates to orfc branding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

internal: route completed tasks through waiting when auto-submit is off

Non-test tasks that finished (end_turn) previously bypassed the waiting
state entirely, going directly to committing → done regardless of the
auto-submit toggle. Now they always transition to waiting for human
review. When auto-submit is enabled, tryAutoSubmit picks up naturally
completed tasks (stop_reason=end_turn) and runs the commit pipeline
automatically; when auto-test is also on it defers to auto-test first.
